name: JetBrains
description: Czech software company producing IDEs and developer tools including IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, Rider, and the Kotlin programming language.

years.notes: Beam logo introduced with the 2016 Pajama-led rebrand. Four colored beams radiating from a central black JB square.
Current curved-cut square mark with orange-red-magenta gradient. Mark-only variant from the official JetBrains/logos repository.
